SEARCH
Package minum.web

Class StartLine

java.lang.Object
minum.web.StartLine
public class StartLine extends Object
This class holds data and methods for dealing with the "start line" in an HTTP request. For example, GET /foo HTTP/1.1

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static final record 
    StartLine.PathDetails
    Some essential characteristics of the path portion of the start line
    static enum 
    StartLine.Verb
    These are the HTTP Verbs we handle.

  • Constructor Details

    • StartLine

      public StartLine(StartLine.Verb verb, StartLine.PathDetails pathDetails, WebEngine.HttpVersion version, String rawValue, Context context)
      Parameters:
      verb - GET, POST, etc.
      pathDetails - See StartLine.PathDetails
      version - the version of HTTP we're receiving
      rawValue - he entire line of the start line

  • Method Details

    • EMPTY

      public static StartLine EMPTY(Context context)

    • queryString

      public Map<String,String> queryString()
      Returns a map of the key-value pairs in the URL, for example in http://foo.com?name=alice you have a key of name and a value of alice.

    • extractStartLine

      public StartLine extractStartLine(String value)
      Given the string value of a startline (like GET /hello HTTP/1.1) validate and extract the values for our use.
